hasAttributes.name: FH_LoanId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier for entity instances.

hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time when the record was modified.

hasAttributes.name: statecode
hasAttributes.description: Status of the FH Loan.

hasAttributes.name: statuscode
hasAttributes.description: Reason for the status of the FH Loan.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Sequence number of the import that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: timeZoneRuleVersionNumber
hasAttributes.description: For internal use only.

hasAttributes.name: UTCConversionTimeZoneCode
hasAttributes.description: Time zone code that was in use when the record was created.

hasAttributes.name: name
hasAttributes.description: Required name field.

hasAttributes.name: accountingClassification
hasAttributes.description: Indicates whether the financial holding is an asset or a liability.

hasAttributes.name: balance
hasAttributes.description: The balance owed by borrower on the loan, in the original currency of the financial holding.

hasAttributes.name: balance_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the balance in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: balanceDefault
hasAttributes.description: Balance converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: balanceExchangerate
hasAttributes.description: Exchange rate between the transaction currency of the financial holding and the default currency (1 unit of transaction currency = X units of default currency).

hasAttributes.name: capitalArrears
hasAttributes.description: Capitalized arrears is the total overdue principal, interest, or other amounts which have been added to capital balance of the loan.

hasAttributes.name: capitalarrears_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the capitalized arrears in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: capitalArrears_default
hasAttributes.description: Capitalized arrears converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: collectionRisk
hasAttributes.description: The level of risk that a borrower may not be able to repay a loan.

hasAttributes.name: delinquencyStatus
hasAttributes.description: Indication of whether the customer's loan is delinquent or not (that is, whether any payments are overdue or not).

hasAttributes.name: disbursedAmount
hasAttributes.description: The amount of loan that has been disbursed to the customer so far.

hasAttributes.name: disbursedamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the disbursed amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: disbursedAmount_default
hasAttributes.description: Disbursed amount converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: disbursementDate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the loan was disbursed to the borrower.

hasAttributes.name: feeArrears
hasAttributes.description: Total amount of fees for overdue payments on the loan.

hasAttributes.name: feearrears_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the fee arrears in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: feeArrears_default
hasAttributes.description: Fee arrears converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: financialHoldingCategory
hasAttributes.description: The category of the financial holding (Accounts, Long-term savings, Investments, Loans and Lines or credit).

hasAttributes.name: financialHoldingType
hasAttributes.description: Subtypes under Financial Category.

hasAttributes.name: installmentAmount
hasAttributes.description: The equal monthly installment payments a customer makes to the bank toward repayment of the loan (EMI).

hasAttributes.name: installmentamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the installment amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: installmentAmount_default
hasAttributes.description: Installment amount converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: integrationKey
hasAttributes.description: Used by the system integrator to uniquely define the data record.

hasAttributes.name: interestArrears
hasAttributes.description: Total overdue interest amount on the loan.

hasAttributes.name: interestarrears_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the interest arrears in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: interestArrears_default
hasAttributes.description: Interest arrears converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: interestrate
hasAttributes.description: The rate of interest charged to the loan borrower during a defined period or term during the course of a loan.

hasAttributes.name: interestReviewPeriod
hasAttributes.description: The time period that defines the periodic interest rate timeframe.

hasAttributes.name: interestType
hasAttributes.description: The type of interest charged on the loan: fixed, periodical, floating, etc.

hasAttributes.name: lastPaymentAmount
hasAttributes.description: The amount that was paid by the customer towards the loan in the last loan payment.

hasAttributes.name: lastpaymentamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the last payment amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: lastPaymentAmount_default
hasAttributes.description: Last payment amount converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: lastPaymentDate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the last repayment towards the loan was made by the customer.

hasAttributes.name: loanStartDate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the first repayment on the loan is made.

hasAttributes.name: maturitydate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the final payment is due on a financial holding. This can be a repayment towards an investment, a loan, or a saving.

hasAttributes.name: modeofPayment
hasAttributes.description: The method that customer is making repayments towards the loan.

hasAttributes.name: nextInterestReviewDate
hasAttributes.description: In case of periodical interest, the next interest review date.

hasAttributes.name: nextPaymentAmount
hasAttributes.description: The amount that needs to be paid by the customer towards the loan in the next installment.

hasAttributes.name: nextpaymentamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the next payment amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: nextPaymentAmount_default
hasAttributes.description: Next payment amount converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: nextPaymentDate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the next payment towards the financial holding is due. This can be applied to credits and loans.

hasAttributes.name: numberofDeferralsMade
hasAttributes.description: Total number of installment deferrals made by the customer (i.e. number of times customer has taken a loan repayment holiday from the bank).

hasAttributes.name: numberofInstallmentsPaid
hasAttributes.description: Total number of installments that have been paid back by the customer so far.

hasAttributes.name: overdueDate
hasAttributes.description: The date on which the repayment was missed and the loan became overdue.

hasAttributes.name: principalAmount
hasAttributes.description: The principal amount of the financial holding.

hasAttributes.name: principalamount_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the principal amount in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: principalAmount_default
hasAttributes.description: Principal amount converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: repaymentAccount
hasAttributes.description: Source account of repayments.

hasAttributes.name: totalArrear
hasAttributes.description: The total amount of repayments towards the loan which have been missed by the customer and are overdue.

hasAttributes.name: totalarrear_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the total arrear in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: totalArrear_default
hasAttributes.description: Total arrear converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: totalInterestPaid
hasAttributes.description: Total amount of payments made towards interest of the loan to date.

hasAttributes.name: totalinterestpaid_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the total interest paid in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: totalInterestPaid_default
hasAttributes.description: Total interest paid converted to default currency of the system.

hasAttributes.name: balanceDisplayValue
hasAttributes.description: Display value shows the balance of a financial holding in accordance with the type of the financial holding. Financial holdings that are typically defined as a customer's liabilities (such as lines of credit and loans) are presented as positive when the customer owes money to the financial institution (that is, a loan with an accounting value of -500 will appear as 500). In the inverse case: the display value will be negative for debit balances on a credit financial holding (such as overpayment of a credit card), or overdrawn account.

hasAttributes.name: balancedisplayvalue_Base
hasAttributes.description: Value of the balance display value in base currency.

hasAttributes.name: dayspastdue
hasAttributes.description: The number of days that the customer has been in overdue status for this loan account.

definitions.description: Loans held by the customer with the financial institution.
